英國武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Manasser Biset於1132年3月2日出生在英國武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特時，他的父親William "the Carpenter" Bisset26歲，母親Hawise22歲。他和Alice Falaise至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1176年7月6日在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾布拉德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Manasser Biset于1132年3月2日出生在英国武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特时，他的父亲William "the Carpenter" Bisset26岁，母亲Hawise22岁。他和Alice Falaise至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1176年7月6日在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾布拉德利。

nameMeanings.name: Biset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Bissett  .
French: from a diminutive of Old French bisse ‘fine linen’ (see Bisson ).

variants.name: Bissett
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French biset ‘dark’, a diminutive of bis (see Biss ).

Altered form of French Bizet: nickname for someone with a dark complexion, derived from bis ‘grayish-brown’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Bissette .

History: The surname Bissett (see 1 above) was brought to Scotland from Nottinghamshire c. 1175 by Henricus Byset, an Englishman who became a retainer of King William the Lion. — It was Jean George Bizet from Haute-Saône, France, whose surname was changed to Bissett (see 2 above) after his immigration to NS, Canada, in 1752.

en.lifeSummary: When Manasser Biset was born on 2 March 1132, in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, his father, William "the Carpenter" Bisset, was 26 and his mother, Hawise, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Alice Falaise. He died on 6 July 1176, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Bradley, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Manasser Biset est né le 2 mars 1132, à Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, William "the Carpenter" Bisset, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Hawise, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Alice Falaise. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1176, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Bradley, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Manasser Biset am 2. März 1132 in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William "the Carpenter" Bisset 26 und seine Mutter Hawise 22. Er hatte mit Alice Falaise mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Juli 1176 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bradley, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Manasser Biset è nato il il 2 marzo 1132 nel Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, William "the Carpenter" Bisset, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Hawise, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Alice Falaise. Morì il 6 luglio 1176, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Bradley, Worcestershire, England.

イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスター
ja.lifeSummary: Manasser Bisetが1132年3月2日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアキッドエルミンスターで生まれた時，父William "the Carpenter" Bissetは26歳，母Hawiseは22歳であった。彼はAlice Falaiseとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1176年7月6日に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアブラドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Manasser Biset(이)가 1132년 3월 2일 영국 워스스터실르 키더민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William "the Carpenter" Bisset(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Alice Falaise(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 7월 6일 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 브래들리에 묻혔다.

mn.2 March 1132–6 July 1176: 1132 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 2–1176 оны Долоодугаар сарын 6
mn.Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England,: Kidderminster, Wigreceastrescīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.2 March 1132–6 July 1176: 2 de março de 1132–6 de julho de 1176
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Manasser Biset nasceu em 2 de março de 1132, em Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William "the Carpenter" Bisset, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Hawise, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice Falaise. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1176, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Bradley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Manasser Biset родился 2 марта 1132 г. в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William "the Carpenter" Bisset было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Alice Falaise. Он умер 6 июля 1176 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности брадли, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.2 March 1132–6 July 1176: 2 de marzo de 1132–6 de julio de 1176
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Manasser Biset nació el 2 de marzo de 1132, en Kidderminster, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William "the Carpenter" Bisset, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Hawise, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Alice Falaise. Murió el 6 de julio de 1176, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Bradley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
